subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy gaze toward the Kingdom of God! Be thou neither consumed by grief nor melted by sorrow in this most grievous and heart-rending calamity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متوجه بملکوت الهی از این ماتم پرالم مسوز و مگداز و از این حادثه پر درد و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @call to action, @soul; spirit after death, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
